query: SELECT id, title, genre, moodTags, SUBSTRING(lyrics, 1, 80) as lyrics_preview, createdAt FROM tracks WHERE audioUrl LIKE '%d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net%' AND lyrics IS NOT NULL AND lyrics != '' AND createdAt > '2026-05-27 01:11:19' ORDER BY createdAt ASC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2NoQxNASu25QqFj.root --database frNnwU2pwLKJifDR8KqR7c --execute SELECT id, title, genre, moodTags, SUBSTRING(lyrics, 1, 80) as lyrics_preview, createdAt FROM tracks WHERE audioUrl LIKE '%d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net%' AND lyrics IS NOT NULL AND lyrics != '' AND createdAt > '2026-05-27 01:11:19' ORDER BY createdAt ASC;
